source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/90_규격 Test report/[GT1717C] IEC60601-1 CB Certificate (ed.3.2, CB).pdf

document.title: IECEE CB Scheme Component Certificate of Conformity DK-173168-M1-UL

sourceSummary.oneLine: IECEE CB Scheme component certificate for GT1717CP and GT1717C digital flat panel X-ray detector component/sub-assembly.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports conformity evidence for IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-6 requirements addressed in the accompanying test report, with component evaluation limited to clauses identified in the test report.
keyPoints: Applicant, manufacturer, and factory are H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yonginsi, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
Models covered are GT1717CP and GT1717C.
Test report reference ACTS-2026-SM-041 was issued on 2026-03-30.
Certificate date is 2026-04-01 and original issue date is 2025-11-14.
Component/subassembly must be evaluated in end-product application to relevant medical standards.

entities.evidence: Name and address of the applicant H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the factory H&abyz Co., Ltd.

concepts.evidence: Component/Sub-Assembly Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.evidence: National Differences: EU Group Differences, US

evidence.claim: The certificate is an IECEE CB Scheme Component Certificate of Conformity.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC SYSTEM FOR MUTUAL RECOGNITION OF TEST CERTIFICATES FOR ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT (IECEE) CB SCHEME Component Certificate of Conformity
evidence.pageTarget: IECEE CB Scheme Component Certificate of Conformity

evidence.claim: The certificate reference number is DK-173168-M1-UL.
The covered component/sub-assembly is a digital flat panel X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Component/Sub-Assembly Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The covered models are GT1717CP and GT1717C.
The applicant, manufacturer, and factory are H&abyz Co., Ltd. in the Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Name and address of the applicant H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the factory H&abyz Co., Ltd.
Ratings and principal characteristics Equipment: 56 Vdc, 0.536 A

evidence.claim: A certified POE injector has input 100-240 V~, 50-60 Hz, 0.8 A and output 56 Vdc, 0.536 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Certified POE injector: - Input: 100-240 V~, 50-60 Hz, 0.8 A - Output: 56 Vdc, 0.536 A

evidence.claim: Only IEC 60601-1 requirements documented in the accompanying test report have been addressed.
evidence.evidenceText: Only the requirements of IEC 60601-1, as documented in the accompanying test report, have been addressed.

evidence.claim: The component/subassembly must be evaluated in end-product application to relevant medical standards.
evidence.evidenceText: Component/subassembly must be evaluated in end-product application to relevant medical standards.

evidence.claim: The certificate identifies National Differences as EU Group Differences and US.
evidence.evidenceText: National Differences: EU Group Differences, US

evidence.claim: The sample was tested and found in conformity with listed IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-6 standards and amendments.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of the component/subassemblies was tested and found to be in conformity with IEC 60601-1:2005, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD2:2020, IEC 60601-1-6:2010, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD1:2013, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD2:2020

evidence.claim: The accompanying test report reference is ACTS-2026-SM-041 and was issued on 2026-03-30.
evidence.evidenceText: As shown in the Test Report Ref. No. which forms part of this Certificate ACTS-2026-SM-041 issued on 2026-03-30

evidence.claim: The certificate was issued by the National Certification Body and certifies conformity with relevant IECEE Component Certification program requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: This Certificate of Conformity, issued by the National Certification Body, certifies that the above have been found to be in conformity with all relevant requirements of IECEE Component Certification program.

evidence.claim: The certificate does not cover the complete standard and compliance is limited to clauses or requirements identified in the test reports.
evidence.evidenceText: This Certificate doesn’t cover the complete standard as some clauses are not applicable to the component/sub-assembly and in this case the compliance is limited to the clauses/requirements identified in Test Report(s).

evidence.claim: The selected issuing body shown is UL Solutions (Demko), Denmark.
evidence.evidenceText:  UL Solutions (Demko), Borupvang 5A DK-2750 Ballerup, DENMARK

evidence.claim: The certificate date is 2026-04-01 and original issue date is 2025-11-14.
The report was revised to include technical modifications.
evidence.evidenceText: The report was revised to include technical modifications.

evidence.claim: Summary modifications include secondary circuit modification, updated photographs, schematics, PCB pattern diagram, dimensional details, documents, storage and transportation environmental condition, packaging marking and label, and product label symbols.
evidence.evidenceText: Summary of Modifications: 1. Modification of secondary circuits on equipment 2. Update of the photograph due 3. Update of the schematics diagram 4. Update of the PCB pattern diagram 5. Update of dimension diagram for additional dimensional details 6. Revision of documents 7. Change of environmental condition for storage/transportation 8. Update of the packaging marked & label 9. Update of the product label for additional symbols

reviewFlags.reason: Trademark or brand field is present but blank in the source text.
Revision/version is not explicitly stated; DK-173168-M1-UL is treated as the certificate reference number, not a revision value.
